description: Add git status to worktree info: Extend worktree package to include git status for each worktree. Add GitStatus struct with fields: HasChanges bool, AheadBy int, BehindBy int. Add function GetStatus(worktreePath string) (GitStatus, error) that runs 'git status --porcelain --branch' and parses output. Update Worktree struct to include Status field.
note: Updated with prerequisites and file references
acceptance_criteria: PREREQUISITE: Task-03 must be completed first
GitStatus struct exists in pkg/worktree/status.go with fields: HasChanges bool, AheadBy int, BehindBy int
Function executes 'git status --porcelain --branch' in worktree directory
Parses output to detect changes, ahead/behind counts
Worktree struct in worktree.go includes Status GitStatus field
Tests verify status parsing for various git states
